data.title: Cabbacis (OTCQB: CABI) issues shareholder letter from Chairman & CEO Joseph Pandolfino in Niagara Falls, N.Y.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Cabbacis (OTCQB: CABI) shared a letter from their Chairman and CEO, Joseph Pandolfino, addressed to shareholders. The letter discusses important updates and insights about the company's operations.

data.title: St. Thomas University ties for first place in global business strategy competition with two senior teams earning international recognition.
data.description: In Miami Gardens, Florida, on January 28, 2026, two teams of senior students from St. Thomas University (STU) achieved global success in the Business Strategy Game (BSG) by McGraw-Hill Education, Inc. Specifically, Team A SMIF from STU received international acknowledgment for their performance in the advanced online business simulation.

data.title: Intersolar Africa 2026 in Nairobi to boost region's solar growth. Conference on 3–4 Feb 2026 at Sarit Expo Centre to showcase opportunities.
data.description: In Pforzheim, Germany and Nairobi, Kenya, East Africa is becoming a key region for solar power and battery storage, with notable developments in the sector. The upcoming Intersolar Africa event on 3–4 February 2026 at the Sarit Expo Centre in Nairobi signifies the region's increasing importance, transitioning from the successful Intersolar Summit Africa event in 2025 to a comprehensive international exhibition and conference. Rapid population growth, industrialization, and escalating electricity needs are propelling East Africa's energy market forward, showcasing promising opportunities for growth and innovation.

data.title: SOL's price could reach $135-142 by Feb with mixed technical signals. Trading at $126.75, may surge on breaking resistances.
data.description: The current trading price of Solana is $126.75, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) showing neutral and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicating bearish momentum. Based on technical analysis, there is a potential for upside movement to reach $135-142 if Solana is able to surpass crucial resistance levels.

data.title: Phunware launches revamped website showcasing advancements in flagship hospitality platform and products.
data.description: Phunware has recently launched a newly redesigned corporate website that showcases the development of their leading hospitality platform and enhanced products. The revamped website features a modern design and improved user experience, offering insights into the company's growth and advancements in the industry. This initiative aims to provide stakeholders with a comprehensive overview of Phunware's innovative solutions and services.

data.title: Jeffs’ Brands' subsidiary, KeepZone AI, partners with AeroIntegral in Mexico for C-UAS; expanding into global security sector.
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel - On January 28, 2026, Jeffs' Brands Ltd, a data-centric e-commerce firm listed on Nasdaq under JFBR and JFBRW, disclosed its expansion into the global homeland security domain through AI-powered solutions. KeepZone AI Inc., the Company's wholly-owned subsidiary, has signed a reseller agreement with AeroIntegral S.A. DE C.V. for distribution of specific counter-unmanned aerial systems in Mexico. This Reseller Appointment is part of KeepZone's exclusive deal with a prominent aerospace defense technology developer.

data.title: CONSCIOUS CAPITAL GROWTH & PETRA CAPITAL PARTNERS acquire RD Nutrition Consultants, a key nutrition platform.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Conscious Capital Growth (CCG) and Petra Capital Partners finalized the acquisition of RD Nutrition Consultants (RD Nutrition). RD Nutrition is a prominent national provider of specialized dietitian services.

data.title: Hexaware appoints Amit Vij as Chief Private Markets Officer; aims to enhance engagement across Private Markets : Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: Iselin, New Jersey - On January 28, 2026, Hexaware Technologies, a renowned IT services and solutions company operating globally, revealed the selection of Amit Vij as its new Chief Private Markets Officer. With this appointment, Amit will spearhead Hexaware's involvement within the Private Markets sector. The company's stock is listed on the NSE under the ticker symbol HEXT.

data.title: Unanet's Champions 2026 Conference in San Diego will feature Robyn Benincasa, a world champion adventure racer and Guinness World Record holder.
data.description: Renowned speaker Robyn Benincasa is set to impart wisdom on the values of passion, perseverance, and resilience at Champions 2026. The event, hosted by Unanet, will take place in Dulles, Virginia, on January 28, 2026. It serves as a gathering for prominent figures in government contracting (GovCon) and the architecture, engineering, and construction industries. Benincasa will share crucial insights with attendees to inspire and motivate them.

data.title: Pacific Valley Bancorp sets new records in Q4 2025 with total assets at $710 million, up 8.3%, and total loans up by 10.3%.
data.description: Pacific Valley Bancorp, the parent company of Pacific Valley Bank, revealed its unaudited financial performance for Q4 of 2025 in Salinas, Calif., on Jan. 28, 2026. The total assets surged by 8.3% compared to the previous year, reaching $710 million. Additionally, total loans saw a remarkable increase of 10.3% during the same period.

data.title: MikeWorldWide launches new Supply Chain, Logistics, and Infrastructure Communications Practice to meet demand for strategic PR in operational environments. (characters: 124)
data.description: In response to increasing need for strategic PR and communications in critical operational settings, MikeWorldWide (MWW) — a prominent independent PR agency in the US and UK — unveiled a new service on January 28, 2026. Positioned to meet growing demands, this offering targets high-stakes operational environments. This initiative comes as part of MWW's commitment to addressing industry challenges and enhancing communication solutions.

data.title: Hydro One selected by Ontario to construct Greenstone Transmission Line in collaboration with First Nations for expanding electricity system in far north province. Minister Lecce leads the direction on the project.
data.description: In collaboration with First Nations, a crucial investment has been announced to enhance the electricity infrastructure in the remote regions of the province. The project, spearheaded by the Minister of Energy and Mines, Stephen Lecce, in Toronto on January 28, 2026, signifies a significant step towards expanding access to electricity. This partnership is set to play a vital role in the development of the province's far north, connecting communities and advancing the energy system.

data.title: Keriton acquired by Natus Sensory for safe feeding platform. Enhances newborn care solutions.
data.description: A Pennsylvania-based company, Keriton, known for their cloud-based software facilitating breast milk and formula management for safe feeding practices, has recently been acquired by Natus Sensory. Natus Sensory, a renowned global provider of sensory and newborn care solutions, integrated Keriton into its Newborn Care portfolio. The acquisition aims to enhance innovation, clinical partnerships, and customer service within the neonatal and pediatric care sector. This move is expected to expand their reach and impact on infant care.

data.title: CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) focuses on profitable growth and increasing long-term value for stockholders, responding to Third Point LLC's letter.
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), a prominent online real estate marketplace provider, responded to a letter from Third Point LLC. The Board of Directors and management are focusing on driving profitable growth and enhancing long-term value for stockholders. The company's efforts aim to prioritize sustainable development and deliver benefits to all stakeholders.

data.title: Zefr receives MRC accreditation for YouTube viewability reporting via Google's ADH, offering free service to advertisers.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Zefr revealed today that it has attained accreditation from the Media Rating Council (MRC) for autonomously handling and reporting YouTube viewability measurement with integration through Google’s Ads Data Hub (ADH). This move enhances Zefr's capability to provide advertisers with complimentary, independent viewability reports. The accreditation sanction came after a thorough audit performed by an external CPA firm appointed by the MRC, assessing Zefr's procedures and metrics accuracy.
